description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a docker:dind service and the default docker:git image, defining the stages build_image and build_nginx. Add a .nginx_builder_kaniko job in the build_image stage that uses the gcr.io/kaniko-project/executor:debug image with a cleared entrypoint, clones https://github.com/TinkoffCreditSystems/Nginx-builder.git, writes a Docker auth config JSON containing $CI_REGISTRY, $CI_BUILD_TOKEN to /kaniko/.docker/config.json, then runs /kaniko/executor with the cloned directory as context, its Dockerfile, and pushes the image to ${CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE}/nginx_builder:latest; the job is manual and runs on docker tags. Add an nginx_builder job in the build_image stage that uses the docker:git image, clones https://github.com/vadikgo/Nginx-builder.git, builds a Docker image with docker build -t ${CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE}/nginx_builder:latest -f Dockerfile.centos ., logs into registry.gitlab.com with gitlab-ci-token and $CI_BUILD_TOKEN, and pushes the image; also manual on docker tags. Add a centos7 job in the build_nginx stage that uses the image ${CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE}/nginx_builder:latest, runs /nginx-builder/main.py build -f nginx_build_config.yml -r ${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}, and stores any *.rpm files as artifacts; this job is manual and runs on docker tags.
